authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(119) — Waddell Creek (Santa Cruz Co.)
sources.quotedText: Waddell Creek (Santa Cruz Co.) from mouth to Highway 1 bridge. Also see Section 8.00(c) Low-Flow Restrictions.

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40 — Hatchery Trout/Steelhead Footnote (**) Definition
sources.quotedText: Hatchery trout or steelhead in anadromous waters are those showing a healed adipose fin clip (adipose fin is absent). Unless otherwise provided, all other trout and steelhead must be immediately released.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 237142, "Waddell Creek", Stream, Santa Cruz/San Mateo Cos., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":237142,"gaz_name":"Waddell Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Santa Cruz"} — geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13611774.4937, 4452001.3616) converts to lon -122.276651, lat 37.092453, matching the creek's mouth at Waddell Beach/Hwy 1 (the reach covered by 14 CCR §7.40(b)(119)) and Wikipedia's cited mouth coordinate (37°05'33"N 122°16'36"W / 37.09250°N 122.27667°W); ~4.5km from the file's prior coordinate (-122.2810, 37.1328), which sat well upstream near the creek's headwaters in Big Basin Redwoods State Park — corrected to the mouth coordinate.

parameters.note: Only open on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and the opening and closing days of the season within this Dec. 1 – Mar. 7 window; closed all other days of the week and year.

regulations.humanSummary: Open December 1 through March 7, but only on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and opening/closing days.
regulations.verbatimText: Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays and opening and closing days.

parameters.note: Only barbless hooks may be used; no other gear restriction stated.

regulations.humanSummary: Only barbless hooks may be used.
regulations.verbatimText: Only barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Combined limit of hatchery trout and/or hatchery steelhead (fish showing a healed adipose fin clip); 2 fish daily, 4 fish in possession.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily, 4 in possession.
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Also see Low-Flow Restrictions, Section 8.00(c): waters from the San Lorenzo River north through Waddell Creek close to all fishing when the department determines flow at the USGS Big Trees gauge on the San Lorenzo River is below 40 cfs.

regulations.humanSummary: Also subject to low-flow closure under Section 8.00(c).

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
